article_meta.title: — News —Australia's Leftist Leaders Call For 'Tougher Gun Laws' After Antisemitic MassacreAustralia's prime minister sai

reasoning: The model classifies this Daily Wire article as Lean Right with 0.82 confidence. The actual lean of the article is Right or Lean Right — the Daily Wire is a known Right-leaning outlet, and the author's editorial choices (labeling leaders 'Leftist,' structuring the piece to emphasize existing gun restrictions, emphasizing legal gun possession) all point rightward. Lean Right is within one adjacent class of Right, so the classification is acceptable. The reasoning cites specific author prose choices and structural decisions without violating the attribution rule. The key indicators are well-grounded in the author's own editorial choices. Confidence is reasonably calibrated — the article has clear rightward signals but also includes factual reporting elements.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: The article is from Daily Wire and contains clear right-leaning editorial choices: labeling leaders 'Leftist,' structurally emphasizing existing gun restrictions, emphasizing legal gun possession. The actual lean is Right or Lean Right. The model's Lean Right classification is within one adjacent class, which is acceptable though arguably could have been Right given the source and accumulated bias patterns.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.82 is slightly low for an article with this many clear rightward signals from a known Right outlet. The signals are fairly unambiguous — 'Leftist Leaders' in the headline, extensive cataloging of existing restrictions, emphasis on legal possession. A confidence of 0.85-0.90 might be more appropriate. Slightly miscalibrated but not severely.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: The key indicators correctly cite the author's own prose and structural choices: 'Leftist' and 'Left-wing' labeling, the structural emphasis on existing restrictions, the emphasis on legal possession, the highlighting of the immigrant hero, and the absence of pro-gun-control framing in the author's own voice. No attribution violations detected. Evidence is specific and well-grounded.
